name: Justin Matheson
subject: FWD: Bryant Clearly Best Prepared to Lead Washington Inslee fails to justify four years of failure as Governor
disclaimer_text: paid for by Washington taxpayers
body:
| [ ](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=1)
---
Friends –

I just talked to Bill and Barbara and we’re all so happy to with how the debate went. Bill is holding Jay Inslee responsible for his failures, but he also took the opportunity to lay out his vision for Washington.

Check out some of the highlights we sent to the press just now, let us know how you think it went by emailing [info@billbryantforgovernor.com
](mailto:info@billbryantforgovernor.com)
Justin Matheson
Campaign Manager, Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051**[

CONTRIBUTE](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=2)**[
](mailto:info@billbryantforgovernor.com)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jason Roe
Date: Wed, Aug 17, 2016 at 5:20 PM
Subject: Bryant Clearly Best Prepared to Lead Washington
To: Press & Media **For Immediate Release**
Contact: Jason Roe (202) 374-2424 | Jason@BillBryantForGovernor.com

**Bryant Clearly Best Prepared to Lead Washington**
_Inslee Fails to Justify Four Years of Failure as Governor

_ (Spokane, Wash.) - Today, Bill Bryant clearly demonstrated why he is best prepared to be the next Governor after Jay Inslee’s anemic defense of his four years of incompetent leadership of the Evergreen State. Inslee’s first term has been marred by scandals, broken promises, and failures.
* The state has gone from 19th worst unemployment in the nation to 10th
* More than 3,000 convicted criminals were released early, resulting in at least two deaths
* 185 psychiatric patients escaped the state’s largest mental hospital, dozens of them still at large
* Homelessness in King County has increased 42%
* Prison inmates were collecting unemployment – paid for by Washington taxpayers
* Inslee broke his pledge not to support any tax increases and proposed $1 billion in increases, even as state revenues were up 15%
* Inslee has failed to put forward a plan to forward fund education under the McCleary decision, even as 25% of our kids are dropping out of high school
* Traffic congestion has gotten worse, with Seattle now the 4th worst in the nation

Bill Bryant put forward a clear, thoughtful, program for Washington – with no secret sauce. Bryant will put experienced, competent leaders in charge of state agencies, hold them accountable, and even more important – take responsibility. Something Jay Inslee has failed to do. As Governor, Bill Bryant will not make excuses but use his experience solving problems, creating jobs, and leading our state forward.
****Bill Bryant is a lifelong Washingtonian.** **He’s built a company that operates on both sides of the mountains. Bill is chairman of BCI: a firm that helps farmers and agricultural companies export their crops. He is recognized as an innovative local government leader, a conservationist, and is the Republican candidate for governor.

###

Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you have any questions or comments, [click here](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/contact?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=3) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=5) or [Twitter](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ir_debate_supp&n=6).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help make Washington State a better place to learn, to work, to play, and to live.**

Washingtonians for Bryant (R), P.O. Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Can you step up for me right now?
body:
We're falling short of our goal | Peter --

I’ll keep this short because I know how much you already do for this team.

[**Today, I need to ask you to help us out with a quick donation while we still have the time to invest in key states and make absolutely certain we win this election.

**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYyNzA1NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMDM2ODA5S0&mt=1&rt=0) We’re falling short of our goals right now, Peter. But it’s not because you’re falling short.

We have set huge targets because the future we’re fighting for is so important to me and to all of us. If we don’t win in November, we stand to lose so much of what we love about this country.

**Can you step up for me right now? It means the world to me -- and it will define the world we live in after November 8th:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyNzA1NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMDM2ODA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

name: Ben Carson (iPhone)
subject: FW: Our very ambitious next goal:
body:
Peter,

I'm forwarding last week's email to you because we're very close
to hitting our goal.

Our ability to raise the necessary resources is the only way
we'll be able to reach and turn out 450,000 millennial students
in November. We must get this generation off the sidelines.

We only have about $30,000 left to raise in order to hit our
numbers, and your tax-deductible donation right now would be a
huge help. I hope we can count on your support.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=64

-Ben

--------Begin forwarded message--------

From: Ben Carson
Subject: Our very ambitious next goal:
Date: August 11, 2016
To: Ben Carson

Ben,

As part of My Faith Votes' plan to reach 45 million people of
faith and get 1.3 million nonvoters in swing states to the polls,
we are now digging even deeper to reach a group that is often
overlooked at our own peril -- millennials.

Millennials are now the largest generation in U.S. history,
numbering over 83.1 million, yet they are the generation with the
lowest voter participation.

It is imperative that we get this generation off the sidelines,
and here's how we can do it...

My Faith Votes is partnering with a group called im2moro to
inspire and motivate 450,000 millennial students to vote in
November. Specifically, we will reach 150,000 students on 30
Christian college campuses in swing states, and at least another
300,000 through their social media connections.

With these students living away from home, we will use proven
technology to simplify the process for each student to get
registered and successfully cast an absentee ballot.

I'm told this initiative will cost approximately $90,000 and the
good news is that a very generous donor has committed to match at
least $10,000 of what we're able to raise online. Will you help
us reach our goal with a tax-deducible donation right now?

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=64

If you're wondering if your donation will make a difference, let
me share something with you.

The other week, I reached out about an emergency situation in
California. There was a bill in the State Senate to strip
California's faith-based colleges and universities from operating
in ways consistent with their religious missions. Well guess
what? The response was overwhelming and the controversial bill
has now been amended to preserve exemptions for religious
schools. The fact is, through the strength of our supporters, My
Faith Votes played an absolutely critical role and posted a big
win for religious liberty.

Together, this is the kind of impact we can have -- both at the
state and federal level. This is not a theory. Now it's time to
put our resources to work in order to get millennials off the
sidelines in 2016, and I have no doubt whatsoever that we can get
it done.

So Ben, please help us hit our financial goal with a
tax-deductible donation now. We're itching to get to work and
deliver another victory for our Judeo-Christian values.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=64

Thank you so much for your ongoing support, we truly cannot do
this without you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate:

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: big news
body:
No such thing as too low | Peter --

We woke up to big news from the Trump campaign yesterday: After weeks of being frustrated by advisors pushing him to moderate his tone to appeal to general election voters, Trump decided he needed a change.

Now he’s bringing on people who will just let Trump be Trump.

The new CEO for the Trump campaign is a guy named Steve Bannon -- a one-time Hollywood producer who once spent $1 million of his own money financing a film about Sarah Palin and most recently worked as the chief executive of _Breitbart News._

What’s _Breitbart News_?

It’s the website that right-wing talk radio hosts wake up and read every morning. It has a deep following in the far fringes of the Republican Party -- the most openly xenophobic and conspicuously race-conscious nationalists in the conservative movement.

To give you a sense of what I mean, _Breitbart News_ once published a piece attacking Bill Kristol, the conservative political pundit, with a headline that called him a “RENEGADE JEW.” That's not the kind of language you'd see even on Fox News, let alone a normal media outlet.

In April, the Southern Poverty Law Center noted that Breitbart, under Bannon’s leadership, has, “undergone a noticeable shift toward embracing ideas on the extremist fringe of the conservative right. Racist ideas. Race-baiting ideas. Anti-Muslim and anti-Immigrant ideas.”

Now Steve Bannon is at the helm of Trump’s presidential campaign.

We have to expect him to make this race (even more of) a street fight, where absolutely nothing is over the line, no attack is too nasty or too baseless to be worth spewing, and there's just no such thing as too low.

But here's what makes this even more troubling: The Trump campaign made this announcement while simultaneously telling reporters that they're reserving time to run television ads in a series of battleground states for the first time in the general election. So at the very moment they're bringing on the godfather of the ugliest, most dishonest so-called "news" site on the internet, they're also saying they're going to blanket the airwaves with his messaging.

This is not just part of your usual campaign back-and-forth. It's an extraordinary moment in what has already been an extraordinary campaign -- a full-on embrace of the very nastiest elements in our politics, backed by a multi-million dollar ad buy.

We have to be ready to fight back and win big. Not just to defeat Trump, but to ensure that his type never returns to the national stage.

**Will you join us right now and get Hillary’s back?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyNzA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMDM3MzIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyNzA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMDM3MzIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Russ Feingold
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer

Will you take this quick survey? | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf445a/1c469400/7c7873e/3573287/3691759506/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/supporter-survey?utm_source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&utm_campaign=supporter-survey&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- The core of this campaign is simple: _Listening._ It's important that I hear the unique perspectives of as many hardworking people as possible, because it's our unique perspectives that make this campaign as strong as we are. **[Now, I want to hear from you. Please take five minutes to fill out this survey, and tell me a little bit more about the issues that matter most to you.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf445a/1c469400/7c7873e/3573287/3691759506/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/supporter-survey?utm_source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&utm_campaign=supporter-survey&utm_medium=ema")** | [LET RUSS KNOW »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf445a/1c469400/7c7873e/3573287/3691759506/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/supporter-survey?utm_source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&utm_campaign=supporter-survey&utm_medium=ema")

Our campaign is about defeating Senator Ron Johnson and the divisive, hateful party of Trump. But it's also about our positive vision for the future we're building together. That means fighting for the bold, progressive ideals we believe in -- like economic opportunity, civil rights, and a foreign policy that reconnects America with the rest of the world. And it means working together to fix an economy that's been rigged in favor of billionaires for far too long.
It's going to take all of us working together to get this done. And that's exactly why I want to hear from you.
**[Your input matters. Please take this quick survey to let me know a little bit more about the issues you care about most.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf445a/1c469400/7c7873e/3573287/3691759506/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/supporter-survey?utm_source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&source=ema_2016-08-17_supporter-survey_oos&utm_campaign=supporter-survey&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for being a key part of our grassroots campaign.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

subject: This guy is a threat to women
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friends: Reproductive rights and women's health in America hang in the balance.

Extremist politicians, like Pat Toomey, are trying their hardest to undermine women's access to health care. Even today, in Pennsylvania, the GOP-controlled state legislature is trying to pass one of the most restrictive anti-abortion, anti-women laws in the nation.

**That 's why we _need_ champions like Katie McGinty to stand up for our rights.** That means taking back the Senate -- and the next Supreme Court justice -- from extreme right wing politicians.

[**Take a stand, right now. Chip in to support Katie -- a candidate who will fight for women's health. We need a champion like Katie in the Senate to make sure we have a Senate and a Supreme Court that defends women's rights.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2434922242635726848/-1018070801506631680?refcode=e20160818&refcode2=e20160818nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2434922242635726848/-1018070801506631680?refcode=e20160818&refcode2=e20160818nd&amount=25)
---

Pat Toomey has made it clear where he stands on women's rights -- and it's not good. Time and again, he's tried to dismantle _decades_ of critical progress by:
* Voting SEVEN times to defund Planned Parenthood health centers

* Fighting to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , and ban a woman's right to choose

* Saying doctors should go to jail for providing abortion services to women

Pat Toomey is wrong for women. I know that -- and the sisters, mothers, wives, and daughters in our lives who rely on reproductive health services know it too.

We can't let Toomey take us backward. Chip in today to help Katie win:

[**www.katiemcginty.com/take-a-stand**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2434922242635726848/-1018070801506631680?refcode=e20160818&refcode2=e20160818nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Cecile Richards

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: August 24: Our first big event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Thanks to all of your hard work in our campaign this past year we have transformed American politics. On issue after issue -- making college affordable, progressive taxation, climate change, trade and many others -- more and more Americans are agreeing with us. People are ready to take on the 1 percent.
During our campaign we assembled a movement of millions of people ready to fight for the country we know we can become. Election days come and go, but the struggle for economic, social, racial and environmental justice must continue. We have the guts and the energy to take on the special interests, win critical battles on the most important issues of our time, and redefine what's possible in this country. Now it's time for all of us to get to work. Please be part of our new organization, Our Revolution.
On August 24 at 9pm ET / 6pm PT, I will address our national network of volunteers live at more than 2,000 organizing meetings across the country. **Please attend one of those meetings in your area so you can get involved in the next steps for Our Revolution:**
Event Near You:
Silver Spring, MD
[The Portico (apartment house) apt 1210, 1203 Fidler Lane, Apt 1210](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpl2jf) | 8:15 pm EDT | [Click to RSVP](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpl2jf)
---|---|---
[Find other events near you »](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpl2jf)
At this meeting, I and others will lay out some of the next steps we can take as a movement to empower a wave of progressive candidates this November and win the major upcoming fights for the values we share. We'll also talk about how you can be a key movement builder in your community for Our Revolution.

name: Greta Carnes, HillaryClinton.com
subject: My "Iowa parents"
body:
| Peter --

In four years of working on political campaigns, I’ve been lucky enough to travel all over the country to help turn out voters. On every campaign, I’ve relied on supporters who opened their homes and let me sleep in their guest rooms, on a spare futon, and yes, even on their couches.

My first time staying with a volunteer like you, I was nervous -- would these strangers really welcome me in their home? But they turned out to be the best! They became my “Iowa parents,” and my actual parents even sent them flowers to thank them for hosting me.

Last week, my mom called to tell me this election cycle, she would be hosting Hillary staffers and volunteers, just like that family in Iowa did for me. Peter, we need LOTS of folks to help out hosting volunteers and staffers, especially in Virginia. **[Do you have a spare room, futon, or couch that a volunteer or staffer could use to rest?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyNzU4NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMTgyMjM1S0&mt=2&rj=ODYzMTgyMjM1S0&rt=0)**

In the past four years, I’ve had the pleasure of staying with lots of different families. In Michigan, if I got back in time for dinner, we would sit around the kitchen table talking about past campaigns (I learned a lot about Harry Truman!). In Minnesota, my hosts would sleep early, but every once in a while I would come home to find some snacks on the bed I was sleeping on.

There was one thing all the families I stayed with had in common: They all wanted to do their part in helping Democrats win their elections -- and let me tell you, Peter, this is one of the best (and most appreciated) ways to help.

**What do you say? Will you sign up to have a staffer or volunteer stay with you? Even if you’re not sure this is the right thing for you, let us know you’re interested, and we’ll be in touch to answer any questions you may have:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyNzU4NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMTgyMjM1S0&mt=2&rj=ODYzMTgyMjM1S0&rt=0)
Thank you,

Greta

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Trump’s new advisor
body:
Facts vs. discredited conspiracy theories | Peter, Donald Trump just promoted one of the most dangerous right-wing fringe attack artists out there to be the chief executive of his campaign: Steve Bannon, the executive chairman of _Breitbart News._

This move makes it clear that Trump’s strategy going into the final weeks of the election will be not just to attack Hillary all day, every day, but to attack the very idea of the America we believe in. The idea that we ought to treat each other with decency rather than hatred. The idea that immigrants, and Muslims, and LGBT people, and everyone has a place in our country and deserves better than to be denigrated by their president. The idea that politics should be based on facts rather than discredited conspiracy theories. That's all up for grabs now.

If we fall behind Trump in August fundraising -- as we very well could -- their strategy just might work. And the consequences would go far beyond what we've seen in past elections.**[Can you chip in $1 to make sure that doesn’t happen?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyNzYyODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMTg3NTc1S0&mt=1&rt=0) **

The money we raise this month will inform critical, make-or-break decisions about how many voters we can reach in September. We can guess what we’ll be up against: With Bannon as Trump’s new chief, we expect the airwaves to be inundated with the most disgusting attack ads you can imagine.

If we want to win, we have to fight back just as hard to make sure voters know the truth about Hillary -- and the truth about Trump.

**We’re counting on you, Peter. Can you chip in $1 right now? If we let them play dirty -- and win -- I know how much we’ll regret it:**

Thanks,

Robby

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Affordable education (let me know)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, PO Box 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50440/7be36b49/1eed4728/78f8a124/2390186347/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Here's one thing I know for sure from talking to folks around Indiana -- college costs a lot more now than it did when I was an undergrad at IU.

In fact, for many American families, the cost of college has gotten so high as to be out of reach. On top of that, student debt has skyrocketed -- in Indiana, the average graduate of a four-year institution has nearly $30,000 in debt.

**We need solutions to this crisis. And I 'm committed to finding them as your senator. [Will you stand with me in my fight to make college more affordable?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50440/7be36b49/1eed4728/78f8a12b/2390186347/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-evan-for-affordable-education-")**

When I was governor of Indiana, my administration took a big step toward solving the college affordability problem. We created the state's 21st Century Scholars program, which rewards students who get decent grades and stay out of trouble with scholarships for four years of undergraduate tuition. This program has made college attainable for over 70,000 Hoosier students to date.

**As your senator, I will work to forge innovative solutions like the 21st Century Scholars program to ensure that America 's kids have a path to college -- and to economic security.

[Will you let me know you support my efforts to get college costs down for our students? Then add your name.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50440/7be36b49/1eed4728/78f8a12b/2390186347/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-evan-for-affordable-education-")**

Unfortunately, my opponent Congressman Todd Young doesn't seem to have the same vision for helping students. He's supported policies that would cost the average Indiana student with a loan over $5,000 more than what they're paying now.

That's the opposite of what we need -- but with your help, we'll defeat Congressman Young and get to work on solving our problems, together.

**[Say you stand with me to address the cost of college in America.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50440/7be36b49/1eed4728/78f8a12b/2390186347/VEsC/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-evan-for-affordable-education-")**

Thank you,

Evan

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: just a little behind
body:
This is more important than ever before | Peter --

I never expected to have to email you in August 2016 and tell you that -- despite our best efforts and a team of more than 2 million grassroots donors on our side -- we’re still not raising the kind of money we should be.

Now let me be transparent about what I mean. We're not in some massive hole. We're not hitting any panic buttons.

We're just a little behind where we need to be -- seven percent off projections one day, three percent off the mark the next.

But it's persistent, and that's what has me worried.

Here’s why: We’re ahead in the polls right now because we’ve invested in advertising at the right time and put organizers on the ground all across the country. We built this lead with a budget based on our understanding of how much support we could count on from our supporters.

But if Trump starts spending the way we are, it's going to have an impact. And we can’t afford that as a campaign or as a country. So missing our goals day after day isn’t something I’m comfortable with.

I’m counting on you to step up. **[Will you chip in to help hit our goal and get your free Team Hillary sticker?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyODA1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMjMxODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There’s no cavalry in the wings waiting to step up if Trump throws something particularly nasty at us.

There’s just this team -- and whether or not we win will depend wholly on if we did what we needed to in a moment like this. I know we can do this.

**Chip in right now:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyODA1NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzMjMxODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

clean_body: This is more important than ever before | Peter -- I never expected to have to email you in August 2016 and tell you that -- despite our best efforts and a team of more than 2 million grassroots donors on our side -- we’re still not raising the kind of money we should be. Now let me be transparent about what I mean. We're not in some massive hole. We're not hitting any panic buttons. We're just a little behind where we need to be -- seven percent off projections one day, three percent off the mark the next. But it's persistent, and that's what has me worried. Here’s why: We’re ahead in the polls right now because we’ve invested in advertising at the right time and put organizers on the ground all across the country. We built this lead with a budget based on our understanding of how much support we could count on from our supporters. But if Trump starts spending the way we are, it's going to have an impact. And we can’t afford that as a campaign or as a country. So missing our goals day after day isn’t something I’m comfortable with. I’m counting on you to step up. There’s no cavalry in the wings waiting to step up if Trump throws something particularly nasty at us. There’s just this team -- and whether or not we win will depend wholly on if we did what we needed to in a moment like this. I know we can do this. Chip in right now: Thanks, Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Happy anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA
body:
| | | | We've made so much progress in so many ways...
---
---
| | | [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11726jSXeUhV8R0hVSzcfwM)
---
| | |
## Peter,
## ****96 years ago today, the 19th Amendment was passed, giving women the right to vote.**
---
| **We've made so much progress in so many ways --but there's a lot of work to be done: ** [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1172hQegkewMkXa4202iusJ) Securing our right to vote was the culmination of a decades-long struggle for equality--a fight led by brave Republican women like Elizabeth Cady Stanton and Susan B. Anthony. They knew that freedom should not be available to a select few. They knew that we, as women, should have the right to make our voices heard. Today, the left wants us to believe a woman must vote a certain way or for a certain candidate, simply because she's a woman. But instead, we must exercise our fundamental right to vote, and vote however we choose. That's not just our right as women, but our right as Americans. Happy anniversary, on this special day for our country and our freedoms. **Carly**

---
---

| | |
##### PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/u/1aGI9Dx1DDtCanfBUunb) if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Carly for America.
